title: Wool Gambeson
description: Leather equivalent armor made from wool (technically carpet)
body:
Pretty basic mod that adds a leather equivalent armor that can be made from carpet. Carpet of course is made from wool so I'll keep calling it "Wool Gambeson" because "Carpet Gambeson" just sounds too silly.

Standard armor crafting shapes. Any color works but the armor will always look the same.

This is kind of handy if you have lots of sheep and no cows. Or if you just can't bring yourself to raise a sword to your pet cows.
